highlights.text: Serial code VN-010 | TRAGUIN tour code TRG-VNM-GRD-2026
Country: Vietnam, Southeast Asia | Category: Premium Grand Vietnam Tour Package
Destinations: Hanoi • Halong Bay Cruise • Hoi An • Da Nang • Ho Chi Minh City • Mekong Delta
Vehicle / Meals: Private Luxury Van / Buffet Breakfast & Curated Dinners

itinerary.title: Grand Vietnam Tour
itinerary.overview:
08 Nights / 09 Days Grand Vietnam Premium Expedition SERIAL CODE: VN-010 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-VNM-GRD-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Vietnam CATEGORY: Premium Grand Vietnam Tour Package DURATION: 08 Nights / 09 Days Hanoi (2N) + Halong (2N) + Da Nang/Hoi An (2N) + Ho Chi Minh (2N)

TOUR OVERVIEW
Experience the ultimate discovery of Vietnam with our TRAGUIN curated Grand Expedition. This comprehensive 9-day journey covers the most iconic destinations across Vietnam—from the cultural heart of Hanoi and serene Halong Bay to the coastal magic of Hoi An and the vibrant energy of Ho Chi Minh City, ensuring unforgettable memories in ultimate comfort. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 08 Nights / 09 Days Vietnam package (VN-010 / TRG-VNM-GRD-2026): Hanoi • Halong Bay Cruise • Hoi An • Da Nang • Ho Chi Minh City • Mekong Delta with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: Day 07: FLIGHT TO HO CHI MINH CITY

days.title: ARRIVAL IN HANOI
days.description: Arrive in Hanoi. Private transfer to your handpicked premium hotel. Evening at leisure.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: HANOI CULTURAL HIGHLIGHTS
days.description: Comprehensive city tour covering Hanoi’s most famous landmarks, providing a rich educational experience.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: HALONG BAY CRUISE COMMENCEMENT
days.description: Travel to Halong Bay. Board your ultra-luxury cruise vessel for an extraordinary journey through the limestone karsts.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: HALONG BAY ADVENTURE
days.description: Enjoy exclusive activities aboard the cruise, including cave exploration, kayaking, and sunset deck relaxation —creating unforgettable memories.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: FLIGHT TO DA NANG
days.description: Morning cruise brunch. Transfer to airport for your flight to Da Nang. Check into a luxury coastal resort.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: HOI AN ANCIENT TOWN
days.description: Guided tour of Hoi An's Ancient Town, famous for its unique architecture and lantern-lit streets.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: FLIGHT TO HO CHI MINH CITY
days.description: Transfer to Da Nang airport for flight to Ho Chi Minh City. Evening city orientation and luxury dining.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: MEKONG DELTA EXPLORATION
days.description: Private full-day excursion to the Mekong Delta, experiencing the lush waterways and local life in an exclusive experience.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer, completing your premium grand Vietnam expedition.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.
